= format_yaml




== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root = this.doc.format_yaml()

# In:  {"doc":{"foo":"bar"}}
# Out: foo: bar
----

Use the `.string()` method in order to coerce the result into a string.

[,bloblang]
----
root.doc = this.doc.format_yaml().string()

# In:  {"doc":{"foo":"bar"}}
# Out: {"doc":"foo: bar\n"}
----
